List all tasks

Source: R/rrq_task.R
rrq_task_list.Rd

List all tasks. This may be a lot of tasks, and so can be quite slow to execute.

Usage

rrq_task_list(controller = NULL)

Arguments

controller

The controller to use. If not given (or NULL) we'll use the controller registered with rrq_default_controller_set().

Value

A character vector

Examples


obj <- rrq_controller("rrq:example")

rrq_task_list(controller = obj)
#>  [1] "f58ce8cd7fe5f203947fc6f1810a3f9e" "777d585f36f4499dae5102e732048ebd"
#>  [3] "fcb815d03fd20d382f01fdb75a493fac" "93e56a7f395d9e2e90b874738af9f4a1"
#>  [5] "6e1eac5bf27146d82f588aafee3a58a1" "249498683bf7bcc22666e2ecb571dbbc"
#>  [7] "6b2176aea06c975ac31a322ac6ef9e83" "d934cd3f0589c222ee7a20f8b72ab0e5"
#>  [9] "5ab2f25f2d75dcd0a934c78033509b61" "1ec1886d28b2a6bef5197021a9197bb2"
#> [11] "4aff31763ece1058ce260bb964a45b7b" "020fc9cc9828bc56463d817707f318b6"
#> [13] "7add5b41b468676b48792fdc9ccf7cf9" "e59353c51cdd08ecfe348298a3b1d7e5"
#> [15] "5d021cad8cd38211187f9f77dce910b5" "ec6c83c9e086bbbd7d81c6645b82207f"
#> [17] "e92a60bd461383b7329b55f27b3965a7" "22cdfcdd2941b77fc49629846ad0444a"
#> [19] "f1a870f918d4a402ca1709562e443c4b" "0dd8f1fe7eaf96e2edcc7f16e78a0a18"
#> [21] "77a2c4e34b8b3d230e0b7bb9807844a1" "3913abdc4c1012f134233a3b75d1b196"
#> [23] "4d2e91ce7b9da7143fe39c6a61735454" "2ebf8763b951a4ed20180e859767edf9"
#> [25] "0d9106de760242712343ee35e4019c19" "be59c9bc9397c1f801ac21f27640faec"
#> [27] "67b5c47d849e1aa5c420e404f75fe4f4" "05a880b25cf800c1e3b071c44be09bf5"
#> [29] "5b75da35771b1e29a110eda678f4a078" "726091b696208a809f3f35d5e8c70f2f"
#> [31] "97261190c9158987267c501097d5f699" "f22e5a9b4df265bd611feb0e0f0e9660"
#> [33] "d7f256093370f87039dadb4d6d50cb89" "542660e30e4cf248a14764230bee1f17"
#> [35] "59208a3a75802ecb7fe715a1988f86a7" "aecc86685d2aa8a71b5ee9d88796a979"
#> [37] "b2339adfd2dbd13d96c15b208c06c7a0" "299b6ed70e50956ec10c150808e3567b"
#> [39] "a01dd64cad234bf8190b0f24e11fbeeb" "45eadfbabd0bd0805d1feba892fe0362"
#> [41] "edfbc69b39e9f9f7835578a58ee94971" "837502825300bf9962f98c34342892ca"
